case_title: ZHONG WEN PANG VS. TOMMY SIU ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-16-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-16-2016 BY JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF AND (3) DEFENDANTS. BOTH PARTIES ARE ASSISTED BY A FAMILY MEMBER INTERPRETING ENGLISH/CANTONESE. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)
